except (connects to لَا إِلٰهَ - 'there is no god')
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The Lord (subject of فَتَعٰلَى - so exalted is)
of the noble/generous one (describing العرش/the throne)
a god (object of يَدْعُ - calls upon)
at, with, near (of رَبِّهِۦٓ - his Lord)
indeed he/it (connected to لَا يُفْلِحُ - will not succeed)
the disbelievers (subject of لَا يُفْلِحُ - will not succeed)
O my Lord! (calling upon for ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ - forgive and have mercy)
forgive! (command to one person) (connected to رَّبِّ - O Lord)
and you (addressing Allah in this ayah)
best (of الرَّاحِمِينَ - those who show mercy)
the most merciful ones (after خَيْرُ/best of)
